snippet.title: EPIC - Teaser | Anand Deverakonda, Vaishnavi Chaitanya | Hesham AW | Naga Vamsi S | Aditya Hasan
snippet.description:
A beautifully crafted love story that captures the essence of everyday life and relationships ❤️

Here's EPIC Teaser. In Cinemas Very Soon.

CAST & CREW
Starring: Anand Deverakonda, Vaishnavi Chaitanya
Writer & Director: Aditya Haasan
Produced by: Suryadevara Naga Vamsi & Sai Soujanya
Music: Hesham Abdul Wahab
Cinematographer : Azeem Mohammad
Editing: Navin Nooli
Production designer: Avinash kolla 
Choreographer: Leelavathi
Costume designers: Sandhya Sabbavarapu
Executive Producer: Phani K Varma
Co-Producers: Venkat Upputuri - VMR
Line producer: CH Ramakrishna Reddy 
Production Controler: Karuturi Suryanarayana
Production executive: Pallamreddy Vinodreddy
Art directors: Dheeraj Ponugoti, Prakeerthi Uppalapati 
Co-Director: Gopala Raju (Gopi)
Chief associate directors: Dheeraj Vijay Asrani
Direction Department: Dwarakesh, C.Arjun reddy,Sirisha Andavolu, Harsha vejendla, Agasthya Dantuluri, 
Camera operator: Ashok Seepally
Associate cinematographer: D. Bhargav Chakravarthy, Shashank Kumar Singh
UK Cinematography Team: Abhed Parab, Pooja Sawhney, Parth Chauhan, Sushrut Koche
Online editor: Santhosh Kiran Billakurti
Associate editors: Santhosh Kiran
Billakurti, Anushaa Boga,Thallapelli Pavan Goud
V.F.X : Deccan dreams
Studio head :- k madan
Sr sup & head of production :- anil kumar telikepalli
Vfx supervisor:- raviteja karasala
DI: Annapurna Studios
Tech Head: C.V Rao
Colorist: Ayush
Final Mix: Arvind Menon & Team
Audio on Aditya music

Epic Teaser Music Credits
Composed Produced and Arranged by Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Lyrics:Sri Harsha 
Vocals: Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Guitars and Bass: Sumesh Parameshwar.
Mixed and Mastered by Harishankar V at Aural Alchemy.
Mix Assisted by Santom jose and Azhar Thaju.
HW Sessions Managed by Vichuuuh Praboa.
Special Thanks to Ayshath Safa.


► Subscribe: http://youtube.com/SitharaEntertainments
► Like: https://facebook.com/SitharaEntertainments
► Follow: http://instagram.com/SitharaEntertainments

snippet.title: नाच नागिन जैसन 🐍 | Raushan Rohi | Khushi Kakkar | Maghi Song 2026 | Full HD Video
snippet.description:
🔥 नाच नागिन जैसन 🐍 | Raushan Rohi | Khushi Kakkar | Maghi Song 2026 | Full HD Video 🔥
अगर आपको देसी बीट्स और धमाकेदार डांस पसंद है, तो ये गाना आपके लिए ही बना है! 💃🕺
“नाच नागिन जैसन” एक जबरदस्त Maghi सॉन्ग है जिसमें आपको मिलेगा शानदार म्यूजिक, धमाकेदार परफॉर्मेंस और फुल एंटरटेनमेंट।


🎤 Singer: Raushan Rohi & Khushi Kakkar
🎶 Song: Nach Nagin Jaisan
🎬 Video: Full HD
📅 Release: 2026



👉 इस गाने को लाइक 👍 करें, शेयर 🔁 करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब 🔔 करना ना भूलें।
💥 Comment करके बताएं आपको ये गाना कैसा लगा!
📢 Follow us on Social Media:
Instagram | Facebook | YouTube



🏷️ Tags:
#NachNaginJaisan #RaushanRohi #KhushiKakkar #MaghiSong #MaghiHit #DesiSong #BhojpuriStyle #NewSong2026 #DanceSong #ViralSong


🙏Please subscribe me 🙏

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE with @pajiislive  #gta5 #gtav #gaming
snippet.description:
Welcome to the ultimate GTA V live stream where we race fast cars, explore Los Santos, and vibe with chill gameplay. If you love high-speed races, smooth driving, and relaxed gaming streams, you’re in the right place. Join the live chat, suggest races, and enjoy nonstop GTA 5 fun with laid-back vibes. This stream is all about speed, style, and chilling with the community. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share the stream to support the channel and be part of the GTA V family.#gta6

snippet.title: Milo Na Tum To Hum Ghabraye   Lata Mangeshkar   Golden Era Song
snippet.description:
#90sStyle #HindiSong #SadSong
:- Artist - Dev Fi & Dopali Bhardwaj
 :- Music - Prabhakar Kumar 
 :- Lyrics - Dev Raj
 :- Publisher - KME Network
📧 Email Contact - tcgmediagrouptmg@gmail.com
💬 WhatsApp: +91 7058450904

दिल को छू जाने वाला ये खूबसूरत गाना “मिलो ना तुम तो हम घबराएं” एक गहरी मोहब्बत और तड़प की कहानी बयान करता है। जब प्यार सच्चा होता है, तो दूरियां भी बेचैन कर देती हैं — यही एहसास इस गाने के हर शब्द और हर सुर में झलकता है। ❤️

इस गाने में एक ऐसे दिल की बात कही गई है जो अपने प्यार के बिना अधूरा है। मिलन की चाह, जुदाई का डर और दिल की बेचैनी को बेहद भावुक अंदाज़ में पेश किया गया है।

✨ अगर आपने कभी सच्चा प्यार किया है, तो ये गाना आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा।

🎧 Credits:
Singer: Sonu Raj
Music: Sonu Music
Lyrics Dev Raj

📌 अगर आपको ये गाना पसंद आए तो:
👍 Like करें
💬 Comment करें
🔔 Channel को Subscribe करना न भूलें

#RomanticSong #SadSong #HindiSong #LoveSong #SonuMusic #90sStyle

snippet.description:

Lyrics: 
Mizhi chaanthozhiche kuzhache
And she chirikondu nanache
Urache manasselurachoru 
Ghanayadi Anuraagam

Nejamaava? Cinemaava?
She is a sigmava ? Enigmava? 

If you know you know (IYKYK) chorus

Thedi nadannoru theneecha
Ini Sem aake neeya pareeksha
Aramani neram neeyum ente koode vanniri
Sundari Pimpiriye
So many aasha keri jet mele set 
Ini tell me prathividhi nin chiri chevikalil
Paattukalaaye.. 
Aa cute-ukalaaye.. 
My doodle-ye.. Njan Totallye.. Unusuallye.. 
Falling for you again again.

snippet.title: One Night Only | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
what would you do if you only had one night?

watch the trailer for one night only now. only in theaters august 7.
-----
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/onenightonlymovie 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@onenightonlymovie
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/onenightonlymovie
X: https://www.twitter.com/1nightonlymovie  
Official Site: https://onenightonlymovie.com

What if one messy night turns out to be the best thing that ever happened to you? 

This summer, Will Gluck, the filmmaker of Anyone but You and Easy A, celebrates modern romantic comedy on the big screen with a fresh, witty, swoony original film about searching for love on the least romantic night of the year. 

Academy Award® nominee Monica Barbaro (A Complete Unknown, Top Gun: Maverick) and BAFTA nominee Callum Turner (Masters of the Air, Fantastic Beasts franchise) star as Allie and Owen, two love-starved strangers who crash into each other in an ever-so-slightly fictionalized New York City on the one night of the year when single people are allowed to have sex.

Recently dumped Owen and hopeful romantic Allie might be the only two singles in the city looking for more than just a quick encounter. They both feel a spark when they meet, but a series of missteps and side quests complicate their night, keeping them apart. As they each race toward and away from each other across the city, they just might discover that the one thing they want most is closer than they think.

The film’s electrifying cast includes Maya Hawke (Stranger Things), Julia Fox (Uncut Gems), indie pop sensation King Princess (Nine Perfect Strangers), Ben Marshall (Saturday Night Live), Ziwe (Baited with Ziwe), and screen legends Molly Ringwald and Levar Burton.

One Night Only is co-written, directed and produced by Will Gluck, based on a script from Travis Braun. The film is produced by Will Gluck through his company Olive Bridge Entertainment, and by Olive Bridge VP Jacqueline Monetta (exec producer, Anyone but You).

snippet.description:
Presenting The Come On Kaali Video Song From The Movie KD-The Devil Starring: Dhruva Sarja, Reeshma Nanaiah, Shilpa Shetty & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 
---------------- 
#KD #KDTHEDEVIL #comeonkaali #KD4THSONG #anthonydasan  #KVNProductions #rajusundaram  #jogiprem #kdmoviesong #jodetthu #reeshmananaiah #dhruvasarja #trending #prems #dhruvasarja #newsong #kannadasong #jogiprem #kdthirdsingle #kdsong #arjunjanya #shilpashetty #ramesharavind #kannada #shivashiva #vravichandran    #showmanprem #youtube #anandaudio 
------------ 
ಹಾಡು : ಕಮಾನ್ ಕಾಳಿ
ಚಿತ್ರ : ಕೆ ಡಿ

 ಪಲ್ಲವಿ:
ಬಾರೋ ಮಾದಯ್ಯನ್ ತೇರ್ ಬಂದಂಗೆ......
ನಿನ್ನ ಊರೆಲ್ಲ ಕೊಂಡಾಡ್ದಂಗೆ
ಕಮಾನ್ ಕಾಳಿ.....
ಕಮಾನ್ ಕಾಳಿ.....
ಬಾರೋ ಸುನಾಮಿ ಎದ್ ಬಂದಂಗೆ
ಏರಿಯಾ ಊರೆಲ್ಲಾ ಕೊಚ್ಚೋಗಂಗೆ
ಕಮಾನ್ ಕಾಳಿ.....
ಕಮಾನ್ ಕಾಳಿ.....

ಚರಣ 1 : 
ಅಣ್ಣಾ......ಪತ್ರ ಬಂದಿದೆ ನೋಡೊ.......
ಅಣ್ಣಾ......ಪತ್ರ ಬಂದಿದೆ ನೋಡೊ.......
ಶ್ರೀರಾಂಪುರದಿಂದ ಪತ್ರ ಕಿಟ್ಟಿ ಕಳ್ಸವ್ನೆ  ನೋಡೊ……
ಕೊರಂಗು ಬಂದವನ್ ನೋಡು…..
ನಾಟಿ ಕೋಳಿ ತಂದವನೆ ನೋಡೊ……
ಪತ್ರ ಬಂದಿದೆ ನೋಡೋ….
ಕಾಳಿ…. ಕಮಾನ್ ಕಾಳಿ…..
ಬಾರೋ ಮಾದಯ್ಯನ್ ತೇರ್ ಬಂದಂಗೆ
ನಿನ್ನ ಊರೆಲ್ಲ ಕೊಂಡಾಡ್ದಂಗೆ

snippet.title: ये गलियां ये चौबारा 💖 | Lata Mangeshkar | Padmini Kolhapure, Rishi Kapoor | Prem Rog Movie Songs
snippet.description:
Enjoy Bollywood romantic, evergreen & latest Hindi songs in stunning HDR & 4K quality with crystal clear sound ❤️

Song Name: Yeh Galiyan Yeh Chaubara 
Singer Name: Lata Mangeshkar
Movie: Prem Rog (1982)
Music Director: Lakshmikant - Pyarelal
Lyrics: Santosh Anand

Lyrics - 

Yeh galiyan yeh chaubara
Yaha aana na dobaara
Yeh galiyan eh chaubara
Yaha aana na dobaara
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Leja rang birangi yaaden
Hasne rone ki buniyaaden
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi


Mere haathon mein
Bhari bhari choodiyan
Mujhe bha gayi
Hari hari choodiyan
Dekh milti hain
Teri meri choodiyan
Tere jaisi saheli
Mere choodiyan
Tune peesee woh
Mehndi rang layi
Meri gori hatheli rach aayi
Teri aankh kyoon laado bhar aayi
Tere ghar pe bajeghi shahenayi
Sawan mein badal se kehna
Pardes mein hain meri behna
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi


Aa maaen milne gale
Chale hum sasural chale
Tere angan mein apna
Bas bachpan chod chale
Kal bhi suraj niklega
Kal bhi panchhi gayenge
Sab tujhko dikhayi denge
Par hum na nazar ayenge
Aanchal mein sanjo lena humko
Sapnon mein bula lena humko
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi


Dekh too naa humein bhulaana
Mana door humein hai jaana
Meri alhad si ankheliyaan
Sada palkon bhi basaanaa
Jab bajne lage baje gaaje
Jag lagne lage khali khali
Us dam tu itna samajhna
Meri doli uthi hai phoolon wali
Thode din ke yeh naate
The kabhi hanste the gate the
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Yeh galiyan yeh chaubara
Yaha aana na dobaara
Ab hum to bhaye pardesi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi
Ke tera Yaha koi nahi.

snippet.title: Lukkhe - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Lukkhe Official Trailer 
Starring King, Raashii Khanna, Lakshvir Singh Saran, Palak Tiwari, Nakul Roshan Sahdev, Kritika Bharadwaj, Shivankit Parihar, Yograj Singh, Ayesha Raza, Akarsh Khurana
Directed by Himank Gaur
Produced by Vipul D Shah, Rajesh Bahl
Written by Deobjit Das, Purkayashtha, Agrim Joshi
Created by Agrim Joshi, Deobjit Das, Purkayashtha

Official Release Date - May 8, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Lukkhe is an adrenaline filled, musical drama set in the beating heart of Punjab. Lucky, a sportsman, and Sanober, a musician, find their romance caught in the crossfires between police officer Gurbani and upcoming rapper, MC Badnaam, steering a collision course of tough choices that will come to decide the future of all things that Lucky and Badnaam hold dear. 

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

Hoooo
Aaaaaa
Tumhi Ehaashon Mein 
Tumhi Jazbaaton Mein 
Tumhi Lamhaton Mein 
Tumhi Din Raaton Mein

snippet.title: Tujh sang preet lagai sajana💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई सजना Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​
snippet.description:
💖 Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 💖

Is khoobsurat gaane “Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna” mein mehsoos karein sacche pyaar ki gehraai ❤️ Yeh hindi song har us dil ke liye hai jise kabhi kisi se sachcha pyaar hua ho… chahe wo milan ho ya judai 💔

🎶 Soft music, emotional lyrics aur soulful vibes ke saath yeh romantic song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jayega. Jaise ek moonlight night mein ek lantern chamakta hai, waise hi yeh love story aapke dil ko roshan karegi.
Tujh sang preet lagai sajana 🎶💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई बालमा Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​

Tujh sang preet lagai sajana 🎶💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई बालमा Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​

snippet.description:

ಶ್ರೀ ರಾಘವೇಂದ್ರ ಸ್ವಾಮಿ ಭಕ್ತಿಗೀತೆಗಳು | Devaki Nandana | Sri Raghavendra Swamy Kannada Bhakti Songs



Sri Raghavendra Swamy Bhakti Songs including the sacred Raghavendra Chalisa are powerful devotional hymns dedicated to Guru Raghavendra Swamy.
Listening or chanting these Powerful Mantras of Sri Raghavendra Swamy removes obstacles, negative karma, and suffering while bringing peace, protection, prosperity, and divine grace.

Devotees believe worshipping Sri Raghavendra Guru grants wish fulfillment, success, and spiritual upliftment.
Ideal for Thursday Guru pooja, Raghavendra Aradhana, meditation, and daily devotion.
Listen with faith and receive the blessings of Sri Raghavendra Swamy.

 
#RaghavendraSwamy #RaghavendraChalisa #GuruRaghavendra #KannadaBhaktiSongs #GuruBhakti

 
Sri Raghavendra Swamy bhakti songs, Raghavendra Chalisa Kannada, Guru Raghavendra mantras, Raghavendra Swamy devotional songs Kannada, Thursday Guru pooja songs, Raghavendra Aradhana songs, Kannada devotional songs Guru, Raghavendra stotram Kannada, Guru Raghavendra blessings, Hindu devotional songs Kannada, Powerful Raghavendra songs Kannada, Sri Raghavendra mantra chanting, Guru bhakti songs Kannada, Mantralaya Raghavendra songs, Raghavendra Swamy devotion

snippet.title: Pakad Lo Haath Banwari 🙏 Dil Chhoo Jane Wala Krishna Bhajan | Bhakti Mein Dubo Dene Wala
snippet.description:
🙏 Welcome to Soulful Serenity 🙏
"Jahan Bhakti milti hai Shakti se aur Mann ko milta hai Sukoon." 🌸

🎵 Song : - Pakad Lo Haath Banwari
🎤 Singer: - Bhumika Sharma 
✍️ Lyrics / Writer: - Traditional
🎼 Music: - 
🏢 Music Label / Company: - SK Entertainment
📀 Category: - Spiritual / Devotional Music

Is channel ka maksad sirf sangeet sunana nahi, balki aapko ishwar ke aur kareeb lana hai. Aaj ki is bhag-daur bhari zindagi mein, hum aksar apne mann ki shanti kho dete hain. Soulful Serenity ek aisi jagah hai jahan aapko milenge:

✨ Mann ko shanti dene wale Bhajans
✨ Sangeetmay Aarti aur Chalisa
✨ Dhyan aur Positivity bhare Mantras
✨ Rooh ko chhu lene wali Devotional Music

Har subah ek nayi ummeed aur bhakti ke saath shuru karein. Hamare parivaar ka hissa banne ke liye channel ko Subscribe zaroor karein aur ghanti (🔔) dabayein taaki koi bhi prarthana choot na jaye Krishna Bhajan, Shree Ram Bhajans, Mahadev Status, Mata Rani Ke Bhajan, Aarti Sangrah, Chalisa Path, Anmol Vachan Bhajan, Soulful Serenity, New Bhajan 2026, Morning Bhajan, Peaceful Music, [God ka naam] Bhajan, Bhakti Song Hindi New Bhajan 2026, Best Bhakti Songs, Peaceful Bhajans, Hindi Devotional Songs, Morning Prayers, Relaxation Music, Spiritual Songs.

snippet.description:
"Ab Tere Dil Mein Hum Aa Gaye" A 90s soulful music video featuring Akshay Kumar, Madhuri Dixit.

Song Credit:-

Title: Ab Tere Dil Mein Hum Aa Gaye

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Madhuri Dixit, Saif Ali Khan, Paresh Rawal, Amrish Puri

Song Lyrics 👇

Ab tere dil mein hum aagaye to
Tere dil mein rahenge to
Tujhe apna kahenge jhootha aaa
Kasam ki kasam hum tere hain hum
Baat meri maan jhoothe nahi hum

Dil hai dil dil dil hai ye mera
To to to to to
Tera ghar ye nahi hai
To to to to to
Jagah khaali nahi hai jhoothi aaa
Kasam ki kasam hum tere hain hum
Baat meri maan jhoothe nahi hum to
Ab tere dil mein hum aagaye to
Tere dil mein rahenge to
Tujhe apna kahenge jhootha aaa

Agar tu kahe to tere naam likh doon
Agar tu kahe to tere naam likh doon
Main apne hazaaron janam
Wahan apni dhadkan bichha doon jahan tu
Meri jaan rakhe kadam

Teri dhadkane hain dhadakti hai dhadke
Teri dhadkane hain dhadakti hai dhadke
Dil is mein mera kya karen
Tera dil hai ghayal deewana hai paagal
Jo marta hai mujhpe mare
Tu na mili marjaaounga sanam
To to to to to
Jaan jayegi meri
To to to to to
Zindagi tu hai meri jhootha aaa
Kasam ki kasam hum tere hain hum
Baat meri maan jhoothe nahi hum
Ab tere dil mein hum aagaye to
Tere dil mein rahenge to
Tujhe apna kahenge ummmm

Yeh hathon ki mehendi
Yeh aankhon ka kaajal
Yeh hathon ki mehendi
Yeh aankhon ka kaajal
Deewana kare kyun humein
Yehi arzoo hai ke ab zindagi bhar
Tujhe dekhte hi rahen

Yeh bindiya yeh mehendi
Yeh kaajal yeh aanchal
Yeh bindiya yeh mehendi
Yeh kaajal yeh aanchal
Tere vaaste to nahi
Tu deewana paagal hai thoda anadi hai
Ja ja re ja tu kahin
Dil mein teri tasveer hai jhoothe nahi
To to to to to
Teri pooja karenge
To to to to to
Haan tujhe dekha karenge jhootha aaa
Kasam ki kasam hum tere hain hum
Baat meri maan jhoothe nahi hum
Ab tere dil mein hum aagaye to
Tere dil mein rahenge to
Tujhe apna kahenge ummmm

Tujhe chahate they tujhe chahaten hain
Tujhe chahate they tujhe chahaten hain
Tujhe chahate hi rahenge
Dil jo hai tera sanam ghar hai mera
Yahan aate jaate rahenge

Yeh bandhan ki dori bandhi hai tumhi se
Yeh bandhan ki dori bandhi hai tumhi se
Tumhi se hi bandhi rahegi
Tumhi se shuru hai yanhi khatm hogi
Dil ki kahani meri
Ek dujhe ke dil mein aagaye hum
Hum hum hum hum
Ek jab ho gaye hum
Hum hum hum hum
Kabhie hum na hon juda
Hmmm la la

Parbat udh jayenge saagar sookh jayenge
Tum humko bhool na paaoge
Hum tumko bhool na paayenge
Mat jaana mat jaana
Isi ka naam hai arzoo arzoo

snippet.title: Alelle Alelle Lyrical Video | Srinivasa Mangapuram | Jayakrishna | Rasha Thadani | GV Prakash Kumar
snippet.description:
🎶 Presenting “Alelle Alelle” Lyrical Video from Srinivasa Mangapuram, featuring Jayakrishna and Rasha Thadani.
🎧 Composed by GV Prakash Kumar, Written & Directed by Ajay Bhupathi this song brings a soulful blend of melody and emotion, capturing the essence of love and devotion.

Srinivasa Mangapuram is an upcoming Intense Love Drama starring the debutants Jaya Krishna Ghattamaneni, Rasha Thadani. The film is written & Directed by Ajay Bhupathi. Produced by Gemini Kiran, under the Chandamama Kathalu Pictures banner. Presented by Ashwini Dutt and Music is composed by the National Award Winning Composer GV Prakash.

✨ With beautiful lyrics and soothing music, Alelle Alelle is set to become a favorite among music lovers.

 #AlelleAlelle #SrinivasaMangapuram #GVPrakashKumar
------------------------------------------ 
Connect with T-Series Telugu: 👉 http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTseriesTelugu

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars 😱🔥 कौन बचेगा?
snippet.description:
आज की इस 🔴 LIVE स्ट्रीम में हम Grand Theft Auto V के अंदर एक जबरदस्त एक्सपेरिमेंट करने वाले हैं!

🚗💥 100 लग्ज़री गाड़ियों को रेलवे ट्रैक पर खड़ा किया गया है
🚆 और सामने से आ रही है फुल स्पीड ट्रेन!

😱 क्या ये महंगी गाड़ियाँ ट्रेन को रोक पाएंगी?
या फिर सब कुछ हो जाएगा चकनाचूर?

👉 LIVE में जुड़ो और देखो कौन सी कार सबसे ज्यादा स्ट्रॉन्ग है!

🔥 Don’t forget to LIKE 👍 SHARE 📲 and SUBSCRIBE ❤️

►Choreographer :- Rahul Yadav

►Poster Design :- Dhiraj DKT
►Producer :- Raushan Rohi

snippet.title: Siftaan : Amrit Maan | Tania | Neeru Bajwa | Jasmeen Akhtar | Jawaak | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records brings you ‘Siftaan’, a vibrant new Punjabi song by Amrit Maan and Jasmeen Akhtar, straight from the much-awaited Punjabi movie Jawaak. Packed with energetic beats, catchy lyrics, and a festive vibe, this track is tailor-made for wedding celebrations, sangeet nights, and full-on party scenes.

If you’re looking for the latest Punjabi wedding song that instantly lifts the mood, Siftaan hits the mark. Amrit Maan’s signature style blends perfectly with Jasmeen Akhtar’s powerful vocals, creating a track that feels both fresh and rooted in Punjabi music.

From Punjabi dance songs for weddings to trending Punjabi party songs, Siftaan fits effortlessly into every high-energy playlist. Whether you’re making Instagram reels, or just want a song to vibe to with friends, this one has replay value written all over it. Check out the song now!!!

#Siftaan #AmritMaan #NewPunjabiSong #PunjabiMovieSong #JawaakSong #PunjabiMusic

en.title: Siftaan : Amrit Maan | Tania | Neeru Bajwa | Jasmeen Akhtar | Jawaak | New Punjabi Song 2026
en.description:
Speed Records brings you ‘Siftaan’, a vibrant new Punjabi song by Amrit Maan and Jasmeen Akhtar, straight from the much-awaited Punjabi movie Jawaak. Packed with energetic beats, catchy lyrics, and a festive vibe, this track is tailor-made for wedding celebrations, sangeet nights, and full-on party scenes.

If you’re looking for the latest Punjabi wedding song that instantly lifts the mood, Siftaan hits the mark. Amrit Maan’s signature style blends perfectly with Jasmeen Akhtar’s powerful vocals, creating a track that feels both fresh and rooted in Punjabi music.

From Punjabi dance songs for weddings to trending Punjabi party songs, Siftaan fits effortlessly into every high-energy playlist. Whether you’re making Instagram reels, or just want a song to vibe to with friends, this one has replay value written all over it. Check out the song now!!!

#Siftaan #AmritMaan #NewPunjabiSong #PunjabiMovieSong #JawaakSong #PunjabiMusic

snippet.title: ClayJars - Mercedes (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
An original by Clayjars 

Lyrics - Prince correia

‘Mercedes’ is a vibrant, cross-cultural anthem that serves as a sonic road trip through the soul of South India and the sun-soaked coast of Goa, all driven by a modern Afrobeat pulse.
Topping off this rhythm is the nostalgic, celebratory warmth of Goan masala, creating a soundscape that feels like a luxury car cruising through a tropical village.
Enjoy !

The Band
Lead Vocals- Prince Correia 
                        Sheena Fernandes 
Drums- Levi Da'Silva 
Rythm/Lead guitar- Mayven Rodrigues 
Bass- Aaron D’silva 
Keyboard- Clinton Castanha 
Sound- Olaf Fernandes 
Managed by- Silvestre Da'Silva 


written/ composed / recorded/ mix and mastered : Prince correia
Storyline: Prince Correia 
Director of photography : Caniggia Fernandes 
Creative Movement Specialisation & Direction : NRITYA ART SPACE Led by Anup A. Arolkar
Cinematography/ editing/ grading : Caniggia Fernandes 
Poster/thumbnail- Caniggia Fernandes 
Aerial shots : Aron Fernandes 

Special appearance : 

Desi goan 
https://www.instagram.com/desi.goan?igsh=MXdnbm9sNjI1YXA0cA==

Kelisto S. Cleto
https://www.instagram.com/kelistocleto?igsh=MXRzY2ZrdTJsYnhqOQ==

Special thanks to:
Sigmund Dias
Earl Alemao 
Nadir Shaik
Anciya Carvalho
Gauri Fernandes

**intro**

Kai boro aslo mure  modgovcho cholo
Bongo babdeachem teka oklen re sodlo 
Taka  zai kui novro goro goro
Taka zai kui novro goro goro

Ch.

***interlude***

Kai boro also mure modgovcho cholo

Ata zai taka fokot soro soro

en.title: ClayJars - Mercedes (Official Music Video)
en.description:
An original by Clayjars 

Lyrics - Prince correia

‘Mercedes’ is a vibrant, cross-cultural anthem that serves as a sonic road trip through the soul of South India and the sun-soaked coast of Goa, all driven by a modern Afrobeat pulse.
Topping off this rhythm is the nostalgic, celebratory warmth of Goan masala, creating a soundscape that feels like a luxury car cruising through a tropical village.
Enjoy !

BABY IN YELLOW
Welcome to the Ultimate Minecraft Live Guide! In this comprehensive video, we’ll dive deep into the vibrant world of Minecraft, offering you expert tips and strategies to build, explore, and survive like a pro. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned player, our guide covers everything you need to know to enhance your gameplay experience.

🌍 *Explore New Biomes*: Discover the secrets of each biome, from lush jungles to arid deserts, and learn how to adapt your strategies to thrive in diverse environments.

🏗 *Build Stunning Structures*: Unlock your creativity with our building tips! We’ll show you how to construct impressive houses, intricate designs, and functional farms that will elevate your Minecraft world.

🛡 *Survival Strategies*: Master survival techniques with our expert advice on resource management, combat tactics, and how to fend off mobs. Stay safe and thrive in the challenging world of Minecraft!

🔍 *Pro Tips & Tricks*: Gain insights from experienced players as we share lesser-known tips that can give you an edge over other players.

Whether you’re looking to hone your building skills, explore the vast landscapes, or survive the night, this Ultimate Minecraft Live Guide is your go-to resource. Don't forget to like, subscribe, and hit the notification bell for more Minecraft content! Let’s embark on this adventure together! 

#Minecraft #MinecraftGuide #Survival #BuildingTips #exploreminecraft

snippet.title: Raghavendra Yenniri | ರಾಘವೇಂದ್ರ ಎನ್ನಿರಿ | Thursday Sri Raghavendra Bhakti Geethegalu
snippet.description:
Raghavendra Yenniri | ರಾಘವೇಂದ್ರ ಎನ್ನಿರಿ | Thursday Sri Raghavendra Bhakti Geethegalu

#RaghavendraSwamy #GuruRaghavendra #KannadaBhaktiSongs #MantralayaSwamy #KannadaDevotional

Listen to the divine chanting of “Raghavendra Yenniri” and immerse yourself in the blessings of Raghavendra Swami. These Thursday special Sri Raghavendra Bhakti Geethegalu are filled with devotion and spiritual power.

Chanting the holy name of Raghavendra Swami is believed to remove obstacles, bring peace of mind, and bless devotees with success, health, and prosperity. Thursdays are especially sacred for Guru Raghavendra, and listening to these songs with devotion can invite positive energy and divine grace into your life.

Let the divine vibrations of these devotional songs guide you towards faith, strength, and inner peace.

🙏 Listen, chant, and receive the blessings of Sri Raghavendra Swami.

snippet.description:
గురువారం స్పెషల్  లే లే బాబా నిద్దుర లేవయ్య | Le Le Baba Niddura Levayya | Sai Baba Devotional Songs 


Experience the divine blessings of Sai Baba with the soulful devotional song “Le Le Baba Niddura Levayya”, a beautiful wake-up (Suprabhatam-style) song dedicated to Shirdi Sai Baba.

This Thursday Special Sai Baba Devotional Song is filled with devotion and positivity, believed to bring peace, happiness, and spiritual strength into your life. Listening to this sacred song helps remove worries, attract positive energy, and receive the grace of Sai Baba.

Lyrics
ठीक से ना कुछो बीते ससुरार में 
कमी बा बहुते हो पियावा के प्यार में….2
कईले साला अगुआ घपला बा 
की एहो सखी पियावा के कतला पतला बा…..2

Antra - 1
पीसल मसाला बारबाद होई जाला 
बोलीले कुछउ बिबाद होई जाला….2

Antra - 2
मिले ना ओकरा में असली सवाद हो 
आवेलें विनय निर्मल बहुते याद हो…..2
रहब ना अंतिम ईहे फासला बा 
की एहो सखी पियावा के कतला पतला बा….2

Song : सुबह की Top10 मन को शांति देने वाली प्रार्थना
Publish : Subah Savere Prarthana

ईश्वर को परमात्मा कहा जाता है, अथवा यथार्थ रूप में परमात्मा को ही भगवान, रचता सर्वशक्तिमान के रूप में जाना जाता है l इसका अर्थ है कि वह सभी आत्माओं में सर्वोच्च आत्मा है। परमात्मा हम सर्व आत्माओ के पिता (father) है, जो हमे सुख और शांति का अविनाशी वर्षा देते है l आत्माओं की तरह, भगवान प्रकाश का ही एक सूक्ष्म बिंदु है, लेकिन मानव आत्माओं के विपरीत, वो आत्मा जन्म और मृत्यु के चक्र से परे है, अर्थात चक्र मे नही आते और कर्मों के फल - सुख वा दुख की अनुभूति नही करते, अर्थात वो अकर्ता है, सत्य है। भगवान सभी मानव आत्माओं का सर्वोच्च पिता, माता, शिक्षक, सखा और सतगुरु है। हम उनको केवल कठिन समय में ही याद है, यह हमारे भीतर ऐसा अंतर्निहित है। हम परमपिता को अपने दुख के समय मे ही याद करते है, यह हुमारे मन बुद्धि मे इतने तक बैठा हुआ है की वो ही हमारा शांति-दाता है।

snippet.title: Thursday Sai Baba Bhakti Songs | Sri Sai Suprabhatam | Shirdi Vasa Sai Prabho | Sai Baba Songs
snippet.description:
Thursday Sai Baba Bhakti Songs | Sri Sai Suprabhatam | Shirdi Vasa Sai Prabho | Sai Baba Songs

Experience divine blessings with Thursday Special Shirdi Sai Baba Bhakti Songs 🙏

Start your day with Sri Sai Suprabhatam and feel the presence of Sai Baba through powerful devotional songs and mantras.

✨ This collection includes popular Sai Baba songs:

Sri Sai Suprabhatam
Shirdi Vasa Sai Prabho
Om Sai Namo Namah
Sai Chalisa
Om Sai Sri Sai Jaya Jaya Sai
Sharanam Sharanam Sai
Sai Manasasmarami
